---
title: "Stat et al."
subtitle: "Statistics from the ground up, one question at a time."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

A numbered, cumulative Q&A series documenting one PhD student's journey
relearning statistics — from foundations through graduate level. Each
question builds on the ones before it. Start at Q1, or jump in anywhere
and follow the trail backward.
